summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Safe-Spend landing page and dashboard shell. All core functionality working correctly with mocked authentication.

design_issues.issue: Some form inputs missing data-testid attributes for robust testing

passed_tests: Landing page hero section with headline, subheadline, CTAs, and code snippet
Landing page Problem section with 3 problem cards
Landing page How It Works section with 3 steps
Landing page Policy Card component displays correctly
Landing page Transaction Table component displays correctly
Landing page Pricing section with 3 tier cards
Landing page Footer with all links
Navigation links work (Features, How It Works, Pricing scroll to sections)
Login page form renders with email/password inputs
Signup page form renders with name/email/password fields
Signup flow creates account and redirects to dashboard
Login form validation (empty fields, password requirements)
Signup form validation (password mismatch, field requirements)
Dashboard Overview page loads with stats cards, quick actions, recent transactions
Dashboard sidebar navigation - all 9 menu items present and clickable
Dashboard placeholder pages show 'Coming in next update' message
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Logout functionality clears session and redirects properly
